Cabo Verde • West Africa

Sal Island

Reliable winter sun, beaches, and water sports.

★ 4.5 564 reviews
Image slot Attraction Sal Island
Image slot Country Cabo Verde
Image slot Region West Africa

About this attraction

Sal works well for travelers who want a simple Atlantic island break with dependable resort logistics and a wide range of packaged travel options.

How to get there

International flights arrive directly into Sal, making transfers to the hotel zone simple.

Best time to visit

November to June is the strongest period for dry sunshine and wind sports.

Highlights

  • Independent landing page with a clear planning summary
  • Nearby accommodation and dining recommendations
  • External booking CTA connected to a partner page
  • Practical access and timing guidance before booking

Practical information

Use this page to understand arrival logistics, time commitment, where to stay nearby, and which local tour operators are best placed to support the experience.

Full description

Sal works well for travelers who want a simple Atlantic island break with dependable resort logistics and a wide range of packaged travel options. Trek Africa Guide positions this as a practical planning page, so travelers can compare route logic, nearby stays, dining, and partner booking options before leaving the site.

Tour operators active here

Cabo Verde Journey Studio

A locally grounded tour operator active in Cabo Verde, helping travelers combine attractions, stays, transport, and realistic route timing rather than selling disconnected components.

Beach resort

Hilton Cabo Verde Sal Resort

A polished Santa Maria resort for travelers who want reliable beach logistics and a comfortable Atlantic island base.

Nearby dining

Restaurants near Sal Island

Image slot Restaurant Barracuda Restaurant Sal

Cabo Verdean seafood

Barracuda Restaurant

Santa Maria has a real independent dining scene, and Barracuda fits travelers who want seafood outside the resort buffet rhythm.

★ 4.3 (421) $$
Grilled tuna, lobster, cachupa, and beach-town seafood
